docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,231.18 FILED BY MUNKA, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PODOLSKY, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNKA, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PODOLSKY, ERIC $3,115.59 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,225.59, PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES OF $6,231.18 ARE REDUCED TO $3,115.59 AS 50% OF FAULT IS ALLOCATED TO EACH PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PODOLSKY, ERIC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAR-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PODOLSKY, ERIC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2014 - JUDGMENT.
